name: claudesign
description: Multi-platform Claudesign design-skill bundle with validated routing and adapter-based packaging.

interface.shortDescription: Portable design skill bundle with validated routing.
interface.longDescription: Claudesign packages a curated design skill catalog, router contracts, and host adapters for Codex, Claude, OpenAI, and generic workflows.
defaultPrompt: Show me the multi-platform Claudesign usage guide.
